notes: The default source universe is current blog posts plus tutorials only.
Legacy docs/blogs pages are intentionally excluded from default platform coverage.
Only entries with status=confirmed and an existing source_path or equivalent_source_paths value count as published coverage.
Use equivalent_source_paths when one platform article faithfully covers duplicate blog/tutorial source representations; do not republish the same article only to satisfy path-level coverage.
A confirmed platform row should have either a stable post url or an evidence_url for a normal browser-visible page where the post was observed.
Platform rows without a source_path are preserved as verified URLs but do not reduce the not-published count.
Third-party mentions and repo references are tracked separately and are not counted as our own publishing.
